content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于11月24日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月8日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【已知问题】
● 停服维护完成后的一段较短时间内，部分唤醒结果未能在「唤醒记录」中展示。该问题不会影响「唤醒」结果。同时，我们将尽快修复该问题，并补充此前丢失的「唤醒记录」。
  
【更新内容】
一、活动
【限时唤醒：界域锚定】
    ○ 在  11 月 24 日 9:00 - 12 月 21 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒体与命轮唤醒活动会按顺序每周轮流开放！
        ■ 第 1 周「蚀海潜航」：忘却篇「深海」界域唤醒体及对应推荐命轮。
        ■ 第 2 周「血脉涓流」：忘却篇「血肉」界域唤醒体及对应推荐命轮。
        ■ 第 3 周「千光折射」：忘却篇「超维」界域唤醒体及对应推荐命轮。
        ■ 第 4 周「无界空响」：忘却篇「混沌」界域唤醒体及对应推荐命轮。
    ○ 在本次唤醒活动中所获得的 SSR 唤醒体必定为限定唤醒体，所得 SSR 命轮必定为限定命轮。
        ■ 若连续 2 次获取 SSR 命轮后，则下次通过唤醒获取的 SSR 奖励必定为 SSR 唤醒体。
        ■ 若连续 2 次获取 SSR 唤醒体后，则下次通过唤醒获取的 SSR 奖励必定为 SSR 命轮。
 
二、综合
● 唤醒体「莱克」的升级版专属造物「混沌的遗赠」增加了金色边框，使其更易于分辨。
● 「界域研习」的「规则说明」中说明文本格式与颜色有所调整，现在更加清晰。
● 「聚灵演练」中完成试玩关卡后，现在会返回到对应的唤醒体页签，方便领取相关试玩奖励。 
● 「唤醒体」增加了「启灵」排序、「命轮」增加了「叠位」排序。
● 「密契方案」列表中的方案顺序现在会按照套装效果和转录完成度进行排序，以便守密人更快找到相关方案。
● 「幕间演习」的三星奖励界面中奖励条件的文本展示范围现在更充裕、便于阅读。 
● 「幻梦深潜」排行榜中「调查头衔」文本现在支持过长时自动滚动。 
 
三、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了「调查模式」忘却篇关卡 9-5 至 9-11 普通难度的敌人强度过高的问题，现已下调约 50%，使其表现更符合推荐等级。
● 修复了「调查模式」忘却篇关卡 H9-4 至 H9-10 困难难度的敌人强度过低的问题，现已上调约 50%，使其表现更符合推荐等级。
● 修复了唤醒体「珈伦」的「灵塑适性」效果：打出「奇妙料理」后获得的中毒加成仅于当前回合生效的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇的「棱彩透镜」效果在敌方回合结束触发中毒伤害未能生效的问题。
● 修复了部分新增的星辰篇造物无法在「灰烬遗迹」购买及通过「混沌」界域效果获取的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「旅行阳伞」的回复生命效果无法移除「出血」的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「普特尼晨报」的获得算力效果仅能生效 1 次的问题。
● 调整了唤醒体「法洛思」启灵 3「微弱烛光」的触发时机，现在会在触腕攻击完毕后进行中毒结算。
● 修复了唤醒体「24」在部分场合下，「扭曲的死体狂宴」未能造成「穿刺伤害」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莉兹」的技能「绿炎」、唤醒体「弥利亚姆」的技能「无上生祭」未能造成「穿刺伤害」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莱克」于战斗内升级了「混沌的遗赠」造物后，下场战斗被升级的造物不再生效的问题。
● 修复了命轮「旋转，旋转」的中毒不受伤害强效和造成中毒提高影响的问题。
● 修复了命轮「旋转，旋转」在打出非指令卡时，也会触发效果的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中在连续加满护盾后受到伤害时，护盾显示未被扣除的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中第一次受击的时容易发生卡顿的问题。

【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中钥令「定格的仲夏留念」的算力上限-1效果错误地对己方而非敌方生效的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中对方行动时的催促和思考文字对话会错误出现在我方区域展示的问题。 
● 修复了「相位对弈」中选择攻击目标时，唤醒体背景可能会出现黑块的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中「反击」、「迟缓」、「昏迷」状态特效会闪烁的问题。 
● 修复了「相位对弈」战斗记录回放「选择视角」时，角色伤害数据显示错误的问题。 
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「轮选」模式中在轮选阶段网络状况较差时容易直接判负的问题。 
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「轮选」模式中选择「再来一局」后，在下一局的轮选阶段中，卡牌预览的治疗与护盾数值会错误地受到此前「死斗」效果影响的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「轮选」模式中，在阵容调整阶段对方离线后小概率出现卡住的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「隐世的转轮」获得的隐匿层数数值不正确的问题。
 
【一般】
● 修复了「公告」界面中点击「全部已读」后部分公告的「新」标签无法消除的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体」启灵激活后会短时间显示错误红点的问题。
● 修复了「密契升级」和「密契转录」的「置换设置」中，会错误展示尚未开放的密契残片的问题。 
● 修复了「调查行动」中「忘却篇」的部分关卡成就在探索中缺少进度展示的问题。 
● 修复了「调查行动」预览关卡详情时，「敌人特性」说明中可能出现特攻唤醒体头像缺失的问题。 
● 修复了「幻梦深潜」调查完成界面中总评分达到当日新高也会错误地提示「新高！」的问题。修复后仅在总评分达到本周新高才会提示。
● 修复了获取「钥令」时可能出现「衍生卡说明」文本信息显示不正确、且钥令水晶图形移位的问题。 
● 修复了「渊海胎动·限时纪行」界面中「限时专属」右侧图标的待领取金色动效显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了「异梦视界」中各篇章入口点击后未播放音效的问题。
● 修复了「剧情」对话中「威廉」立绘在黑色剪影情况下的瑕疵问题。
● 修复了「调查行动」、「唤醒体」、「通讯」等处「茜尔维娅」名称显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「设置」中画质分级规则对特效表现不生效的问题。
● 修复了部分华为设备可能出现播放动画视频异常的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」界面中画面会错误闪烁、动画不连贯的问题。
● 修复了设备在「存储空间」不足时，下载资源时的文字会错误提示为融灾禁区重置挑战的问题。
● 修复了当安卓端系统语言设置为「土耳其语」时，游戏中选择英语时仍然会错误显示为中文的问题。
 
【本地化】 
● 英语语言设置下，优化了主界面、弥萨格商店、幻梦深潜、融灾禁区的部分界面文本表述，提升可读性。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了忘却篇调查行动第6章、第8章、终章，及凯蒂古拉意识潜游故事中的部分拼写错误、格式问题。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了「档案馆」中杜勒赛因广播剧、波吕克斯广播剧部分字幕匹配问题。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了唤醒体「艾尔瓦」加强后灵知觉醒技能描述未随加强更新的问题。
● 英语语言设置下，修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「莉莉」「报偿打击」等6处格式、数值词缀标注错误问题。
● 西班牙语语言设置下，修复了「防御」指令卡标题错误缩写、唤醒体克珀珊特技能「沉没于远海」翻译缺失问题。
● 日语语言设置下，修复了部分幻梦深潜成就称号错误显示为英语的问题。

**V2.4.0.4 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 11:00 on November 24 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver×200, Pure Core×5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on December 8, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
 
[Known Issues]
● A short period of time after the maintenance is completed, some awakening results may not be displayed in the "Awakening Records." This issue will not affect the "Awakening" results. At the same time, we will fix this issue as soon as possible and supplement the previously lost "Awakening Records."

[Update Content]
1. Activity
[Limited-Time Awakening: Realm Anchoring]
○ From November 24 at 9:00 to December 21 at 9:00, the following Awakener and Wheel of Destiny awakening events will be opened in sequence weekly!
■ Week 1 "Abyssal Voyage": Faded Legacy "Aequor" Realm Awakener and corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny.
■ Week 2 "Bloodstream": Faded Legacy "Caro" Realm Awakener and corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny.
■ Week 3 "Refraction of a Thousand Lights": Faded Legacy "Ultra" Realm Awakeners and corresponding recommended Wheels of Destiny.
■ Week 4 "Boundless Echo": Faded Legacy "Chaos" Realm Awakener and corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny.
○ The SSR Awakeners obtained in this awakening event will definitely be limited Awakeners, and the SSR Wheels of Destiny obtained will definitely be limited Wheels of Destiny.
■ If you obtain SSR Wheels of Destiny consecutively 2 times, the next SSR reward obtained through awakening will definitely be an SSR Awakener.
■ If you obtain an SSR Awakener consecutively 2 times, the next SSR reward obtained through awakening will definitely be an SSR Wheel of Destiny.

2. Comprehensive
● The upgraded exclusive Relic "Chaotic Legacy" of the Awakener "Ryker" has a golden border, making it easier to distinguish.
● The "Rules" section of "Realms Research" has had its text format and color adjusted, making it clearer now.
● After completing the trial stage in the "Team Trial," you will now return to the corresponding Awakener tab to easily claim related trial rewards
● The "Awakener" now has "Enlighten" sorting, and the "Wheel of Destiny" now has "Ascension" sorting.
● The order of the plans in the "Covenant Plan" list is now sorted by set effects and transcription completion, allowing Keepers to find relevant plans more quickly.
● The text display area for the reward conditions on the three-star reward interface of "Interlude" is now more spacious and easier to read
● The "Phantasmal Dive" leaderboard now supports automatic scrolling for the "Investigation Title" text when it is too long

3. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue of excessively high enemy difficulty in Normal mode for Investigation Mode stages 9-5 to 9-11 of Faded Legacy, which has now been reduced by about 50% to better align with the recommended level.
● Fixed the issue of enemy difficulty being too low in "Investigation Mode" for Faded Legacy stages H9-4 to H9-10 on Hard difficulty. The difficulty has now been increased by approximately 50% to better align with the recommended level.
● Fixed the issue with the Awakener "Karen's" "Soulforge Aptitude" effect: The Poison bonus gained after playing "Marvelous Cuisine" only took effect for the current turn.
● Fixed the issue where the effect of the "Prismatic Lens" in Astral Reign did not trigger Poison damage at the end of the enemy's turn.
● Fixed the issue where some newly added Astral Reign relics could not be purchased in "Ashen Ruins" or obtained through the effects of the "Chaos" realm.
● Fixed the issue where the HP Recovery effect of the relic "Voyager's Parasol" in Astral Reign could not remove "Bleed".
● Fixed the issue where the Arithmetica gain effect of the Astral Reign relic "Putney Morning Post" could only activate once.
● Adjusted the triggering timing of the Awakener "Faros" Enlighten 3 "Flickering Candle", now it will apply Poison after the Tentacle attack is completed.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "24" did not inflict "Pierce DMG" with "Twisted Carrion Revel" in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the skill "Green Flames" of the Awakener "Liz" and the skill "Exalted Pyre" of the Awakener "Miryam" did not deal "Pierce DMG."
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Ryker" upgraded the "Chaotic Legacy" Relic during battle, and the upgraded Relic would not take effect in the next battle.

● Fixed the issue where the Poison from the Wheel of Destiny "Fouetté" was not affected by DMG Amplification and the increased Poison effect.
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Fouetté" would trigger effects when playing non-Command Cards.
● Fixed an issue in "Battle" where the Shield display did not show a deduction when damage was taken after continuously filling the Shield.
● Fixed the issue where lag would easily occur during the first hit in "Battle."

[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the Arithmetica Limit -1 effect of the Posse "Beachside Memento" incorrectly applied to the player instead of the opponent.
● Fixed the issue where the prompts and thought dialogues during the opponent's actions in "Traphase" incorrectly appeared in our area
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where black blocks might appear in the background of the Awakener when selecting an attack target.
● Fixed the issue where the state effects of "Counter," "Stagnation," and "Fainted" would blink in "Traphase."
● Fixed the issue where the character damage display was incorrect when selecting the perspective in the battle record replay of "Traphase."
● Fixed the issue in the "Draft Pick" mode of "Traphase" where players could easily lose by default during the draft phase when network conditions were poor
● Fixed the issue in the "Draft Pick" mode of "Traphase" where selecting "Play Again" caused the healing and Shield values in the card preview during the next round's draft phase to be incorrectly affected by the previous "Deathmatch" effect.
● Fixed the issue where the "Draft Pick" mode in "Traphase" could occasionally freeze during the lineup adjustment phase if the opponent went offline.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect value of Conceal stacks obtained from the Wheel of Destiny "Wheel Unseen" in "Traphase".

[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the "New" tag of some announcements could not be removed after clicking "Mark All as Read" in the "Announcement" interface.
● Fixed the issue where an incorrect red dot would briefly appear after activating the "Awakener" Enlighten.
● Fixed an issue in the "Replacement Settings" of "Covenant Upgrade" and "Covenant Transcription" where unopened Covenant Shards were incorrectly displayed
● Fixed the issue in "Investigation" where some level achievements in "Faded Legacy" were missing progress display in Exploration
● Fixed the issue where the "Investigation" preview stage details might have missing special attack Awakener avatars in the "Enemy Traits" description
● Fixed the issue in the "Phantasmal Dive" investigation completion interface where the total score reaching a new daily high incorrectly prompted "New Record!" After the fix, it will only prompt when the total score reaches a new weekly high.
● Fixed the issue where the "Derived Card Description" text information might not display correctly when obtaining a "Posse," and the Posse crystal graphic was misaligned
● Fixed the issue where the golden animation for the "Limited-Time Exclusive" icon on the right side of the "Abyss Gestation: Limited Archives" interface was not displayed correctly.
● Fixed the issue where sound effects did not play after clicking on the chapter entrances in "Dreamscape".
● Fixed the issue with the flaws in "William's" character art during black silhouette scenes in the "Story" dialogue.
● Fixed the issue where the name "Sylvia" was displayed incorrectly in "Investigation," "Awakener," "Communication," and other places.

● Fixed the issue where the quality grading rules in "Settings" did not take effect for special effects.
● Fixed the issue where some Huawei devices may experience abnormal playback of animated videos.
● Fixed the issue where the screen would incorrectly blink and the animation would be inconsistent in the "Awaken" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the text incorrectly prompted "D-Effect Zone reset challenge" when downloading resources with "Insufficient storage space" on the device.
● Fixed the issue where the game would incorrectly display in Chinese when English was selected while the Android system language was set to "Turkish."

[Localization]
● In the English language settings, optimized the text expressions in the main interface, Mythag Shop, Phantasmal Dive, and D-Effect Zone to enhance readability.
● Fixed some spelling errors and formatting issues in Chapter 6, Chapter 8, and the Final Chapter of Faded Legacy Investigation, as well as in the Kathigu-Ra Psyche Deepdive story under English language settings.
● Fixed the subtitle matching issue for Doresain's radio drama and Pollux's radio drama in the "Archive" under English language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the description of the Gnosis Rouse skill for the Awakener "Alva" did not update after enhancement under English language settings.
● Fixed 6 formatting and value affix labeling errors for the Awakener "Lily" and "Strike to Protect," among others, in "Traphase" under English language settings.
● Fixed the incorrect abbreviation of the "Defence" Command Card title and the missing translation for the Awakener Corposant's skill "Sunken in the Profound" under the Spanish language settings.
● In the Japanese language settings, fixed the issue where some Phantasmal Dive achievement titles were incorrectly displayed in English.
Where GMurphy
是非得惦记着那b混池吗？还是喜欢被喷了然后改做m?博个听劝形象?老玩家说你做的改动都是为了新玩家，然后就搞个b大混池让我感觉除了利好你的财报没利好任何人，新人忘却篇缺角色都不知道去哪搞，惦记着你那b普池出限定角色我不如去买彩票然后氪到1w全部自选，很难想象周年庆的草率。还有这个b降低普通提高困难，那我普通打过了困难还没打等于我赤了两坨💩呗😆
好罵<:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> 很多萌新入坑攻略都是推薦買有羊媽的自抽號，我至少看過三個問買自抽會不會封的，在這麼多萌新入坑的週年慶不搞個自選up難道讓新手在普池和這破混池撈？更別提血肉限定還有個賠錢紅花（疊甲我是紅花廚抽了12+11）歪到了找誰說理去？反覆確認不是界域自選up後給我看笑了，校貓你繼續陰
你别说，🐱之前还发个公告说要封自抽号，我是看不懂这种操作了，评价你游是纯纯的左脑攻击右脑

我只能说之前快死了是有道理的，在二周年这种拉新入坑的大好时刻你出个🥚墨我觉得没问题，本来墨菲就是高人气角色，剧情在我看来也算主线短小篇幅里写的算好的了。但是你绑神国队友不给我抽神国队友是什么意思，新手来哪有米粒墨菲图鲁?还是打算从980，大混池，亦或是普池抽出来?我三百发普池一个米粒没有找谁说去，再说了你游又不是084那种抽到就是完全体的游戏，0启废物多的是，深海更是几乎全员0启废物，又要⭕米又不知收敛的家伙。星辰篇原本混池也是骂了才改的，你游是无敌了。
还有这个🐦难度，主线普通上难度你是👍 ，让我打25回合大眼然后用花钱的大月卡回溯卡死更是👍 ，萌新体验剧情来的要啥没啥，人物人物抽不到，剧情剧情看不了，玩鸡毛呢。你游现在是想扩圈的吧，还看见说要搞国服这种东西，只能说吃力不讨好。觉得自己基本盘稳了，那你看见的确实全是结晶的声音了，全超限+12肯定好打，那你给他们上癫狂不就好了，又没产能又想⭕米的，打完一章节弹一次氪金点的。
新人想舒服一点推图还得被老玩家骂主线已经削过了再嫌难怎么不玩宝宝巴士，祝你游蒸蒸日上👍
